nasb.text: The Lord gave the people favor in the sight of the Egyptians. Furthermore, the man Moses himself was greatly esteemed in the land of Egypt, both in the sight of Pharaoh’s servants and in the sight of the people.

esv.text: And the Lord gave the people favor in the sight of the Egyptians. Moreover, the man Moses was very great in the land of Egypt, in the sight of Pharaoh’s servants and in the sight of the people.

cnv.text: 耶和華使人民在埃及人眼前蒙恩，同時摩西在埃及地，在法老臣僕的眼前和人民的眼前都成了偉大的人物。

ccb.text: 耶和华使埃及人恩待以色列人，法老的臣仆和百姓极其尊重摩西。
